description: DescribeBatchDeleteConfigurationTaskResponse schema from Amazon Application Discovery Service API

status.description: The current execution status of the deletion task.

startTime.description: An epoch seconds timestamp (Unix) of when the deletion task was started.

endTime.description: An epoch seconds timestamp (Unix) of when the deletion task was completed.

configurationType.description: The type of configuration item to delete.

requestedConfigurations.description: The list of configuration IDs that were originally requested to be deleted by this task.

deletedConfigurations.description: The list of configuration IDs that were successfully deleted by this task.

failedConfigurations.description: A list of configuration IDs that produced an associated error.

configurationId.description: The configuration ID of the configuration that failed to delete.

errorMessage.description: A descriptive message indicating why the associated configuration failed to delete.

deletionWarnings.description: A list of warnings associated with this deletion task.

configurationId.description: The configuration ID of the configuration item associated with the deletion warning.

warningCode.description: The integer warning code associated with the warning message.

warningText.description: A descriptive message of the warning the associated configuration item produced.
